title: Rebase local develop commits and restore green CI on develop

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Reproduced current develop CI failures locally (reports service + feedback service tests), restored GSI->standard query fallback in feedback loading, and fixed report block error-log string coercion. Targeted failing tests are now passing locally; preparing commit/push and CI rerun.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up fix: keep fail-fast behavior for explicit GraphQL GSI errors (raise RuntimeError, no fallback query), while retaining fallback only for non-dict/transport failures. Full local pytest now passes: 3193 passed, 0 failed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed: rebased/pushed develop fixes, resolved CI regressions in feedback/report error paths, and verified GitHub Actions run 24728543456 passed on commit 87456188d (all required jobs green).
